system.description:
When you **_grasp the Azure Hand and impose your will on the elements around you_**, roll +CON: **on a** **10+**, the elements calm or diminish in their power, and choose 2 from the list below; **on a 7-9**, the elements calm or diminish, and choose 1.
- You suffer no consequence (otherwise, mark one)
- The effect is far reaching, up to a mile around you (otherwise, it extends just a few paces) You can maintain the effect easily (otherwise, it takes all of your concentration)

success.value: the elements calm or diminish in their power, and choose 2 from the list below

partial.value: the elements calm or diminish, and choose 1.
